Error: Cannot call impure function during render `Math.random` is an impure function. Calling an impure function can produce unstable results that update unpredictably when the component happens to re-render. (https://react.dev/reference/rules/components-and-hooks-must-be-pure#components-and-hooks-must-be-idempotent). C:\Users\USER\.gemini\antigravity\scratch\predchain\src\app\contact\ContactClient.tsx:150:38 148 |

Ticket Transmitted

149 |

> 150 | ID: #{Math.floor(Math.random() * 90000) + 10000 }
| ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ Cannot call impure function 151 | We've received your statement and will contact you at {form.email} shortly. 152 |

153 |

'use client'; import { Users, TrendingUp, Zap, Link as LinkIcon, Check, ChevronRight, Activity, Globe, ShieldCheck, Target, ArrowUpRight, Gift } from 'lucide-react'; import Link from 'next/link'; import { useFeedback } from '@/hooks/useFeedback'; interface ReferralClientProps { user: { id: string; email?: string }; profile: { username?: string; full_name?: string }; referrals: Array<{ id: string; created_at: string; status: string; referred_user?: { username?: string; full_name?: string }; }>; totalEarnings: number; } export default function ReferralClient({ profile, referrals, totalEarnings }: ReferralClientProps) { const { success, showSuccess, clear } = useFeedback(); const referralCode = profile?.username?.toUpperCase() || 'STRIKERX'; const referralLink = `predchain.io/ref/${referralCode}`; const referralCount = referrals.length; const handleCopy = () => { navigator.clipboard.writeText(referralLink); showSuccess('Ref-link verified and copied.'); }; return (
{/* ─── DENSE COMMAND HEADER ─── */}
Growth Protocol Active
Node ID: REF-OPS-93

Expansion Intelligence

Propagate the PredChain infrastructure to earn ₦1,000 per qualified operative realization. Global Payout Threshold: ACTIVE /// Uncapped

₦{totalEarnings.toLocaleString()}
Total Realized Growth Yield
{/* ─── OPERATIVE CONSOLE ─── */}
{/* Referral Link Card */}

Inbound Propagator Node

Identity: CONSOLE-{referralCode}
Sync Verified
{/* Stats Summary */}
{referralCount}
Total Operatives
₦1,000
Per Conversion

Registry History

{referralCount} ACTIVE NODES
{referrals.length === 0 ? ( ) : ( referrals.map((h, i) => ( )) )}
OPERATIVE ID REGISTRY DATE YIELD STATUS
No Operatives Synced. propagate your link to initialize growth.
{h.referred_user?.username?.[0]?.toUpperCase() || 'U'}
@{h.referred_user?.username || 'Challenger'}
{new Date(h.created_at).toLocaleDateString(undefined, { year: 'numeric', month: 'short', day: '2-digit' })} ₦1,000 {h.status === 'qualified' ? 'REALIZED' : 'PENDING'}
{[ { title: 'Incentive Structure', desc: 'Unlimited scalability. Earn ₦1,000 for every distinct account activation globally.', icon: Gift }, { title: 'Treasury Sync', desc: 'Earnings are instantly reflected in your primary dashboard treasury node.', icon: Zap }, { title: 'Global Coverage', desc: 'Propagate anywhere. Intelligence nodes are optimized for global conversion.', icon: Globe } ].map((item, i) => (

{item.title}

{item.desc}

))}
{/* ─── GLOBAL FEEDBACK NODE ─── */} {success && (

)}
); }

source:
import { Metadata } from 'next'; export const metadata: Metadata = { title: 'Challenge Rules & Fair Play — PredChain', description: 'Understand the elite 3-day streak mechanics and our anti-fraud commitment.', }; export default function RulesPage() { return (

Challenge Rules & Fair Play

The 3-Day Perfect Streak

  • A "Round" consists of a 3-day window with active football matches.
  • You must submit exactly one correct prediction each day.
  • Predictions are outcome-based (1X2):
    • 1: Home Win
    • X: Draw
    • 2: Away Win
  • A successful 3/3 streak automatically triggers the 10X reward payout.
  • If any of your predictions are incorrect, your streak resets for that round.

Match Lock-in

All predictions must be submitted before the official match kickoff time. Once a match starts, the prediction window is locked permanently.

Fair Play Commitment

To maintain the elite integrity of PredChain, we employ advanced anti-fraud algorithms:

  • Multi-account verification check.
  • Bot detection on prediction submission.
  • Manual audit for high-value payouts.
  • Zero tolerance for spoofing or unauthorized API access.
); }

'use client'; import { Users, Wallet, AlertCircle, TrendingUp, ShieldCheck, Activity, ArrowUpRight, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react'; import { Transaction } from '@/types'; interface DashboardViewProps { metrics: { totalUsers: number; totalRevenue: number; pendingPayouts: number }; recentPurchases: (Transaction & { profiles?: { username: string } })[]; } export default function DashboardView({ metrics, recentPurchases }: DashboardViewProps) { return (
{/* ─── OVERVIEW ─── */}
Total Users
{metrics.totalUsers.toLocaleString()}
Registered
Total members in system
Total Revenue
₦{metrics.totalRevenue.toLocaleString()}
Platform total volume
STABLE
0 ? 'bg-danger/[0.03] border-danger/20' : 'bg-white/[0.02] shadow-sm'}`}>
0 ? 'bg-danger/10' : 'bg-white/5'}`}> 0 ? 'text-danger' : 'text-muted opacity-40'}`} />
0 ? 'text-danger' : 'text-muted'}`}>Pending Payouts
0 ? 'text-danger' : 'text-white'}`}>{metrics.pendingPayouts}
0 ? 'text-danger/60' : 'text-muted/40'}`}> {metrics.pendingPayouts > 0 ? 'Action Required' : 'All Clear'}
Payout requests awaiting review
{/* ─── LIVE STREAM & SYSTEM STATUS ─── */}
{/* Recent Activity */}

Recent Activity

LIVE
{recentPurchases.length === 0 ? (

No recent activity detected.

) : ( recentPurchases.slice(0, 5).map(p => (
{p.profiles?.username?.[0]?.toUpperCase() || 'P'}
@{p.profiles?.username || 'member'}
{new Date(p.created_at).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })}
₦{p.amount.toLocaleString()}
Verified
)) )}
{/* System Status UI */}

System Health

OPERATIONAL
Performance node

99.98% availability detected. Node alpha stable.

0 ? 'bg-danger/[0.04] border-danger/20' : 'bg-success/[0.04] border-success/20 shadow-sm'}`}>
0 ? 'bg-danger animate-pulse' : 'bg-success'}`} />
Settlement protocol

{metrics.pendingPayouts > 0 ? `${metrics.pendingPayouts} requests require synchronization.` : 'Payout queue clear. Audit balanced.'}

User Capacity
{((metrics.totalUsers / 1000) * 100).toFixed(1)}%
Positive Growth Sequence Active
); }

'use client'; import { ChallengeRound, ChallengeMatch } from '@/types'; import { Trophy, Zap, ShieldCheck, Target, ChevronRight, ArrowRight, Activity, Globe, Radio, Star, Shield, Clock, Award } from 'lucide-react'; import Link from 'next/link'; interface ArenaClientProps { activeRound: ChallengeRound | null; matches: ChallengeMatch[]; stats: { activePlayers: number }; } export default function ArenaClient({ activeRound, matches, stats }: ArenaClientProps) { return (
{/* Dynamic Background */}
{/* Global Strategy Header */}
LIVE PERFORMANCE ARENA

Master the Sequence.
Dominate the Professional Arena.

The high-precision platform for elite football prediction. Build a perfect 3-day sequence to unlock verified 10X multipliers.

INITIALIZE ACCESS
{[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => (
{String.fromCharCode(64 + i)}
))}
+{stats.activePlayers.toLocaleString()} Active Nodes Real-time sync
{/* Dynamic Status Banner */}
Cycle {activeRound?.round_number || '01'}

{activeRound?.status === 'active' ? 'Arena Operational' : 'Awaiting Deployment'}

Current Pool ₦{(stats.activePlayers * 5000).toLocaleString()}
Network Risk Optimal
{/* Content Flow */}
Global Match Feed
{!activeRound && ( Synchronizing... )}
{matches.length === 0 ? (
Waiting for Round Start...
) : ( matches.map((match, i) => (
DAY 0{i+1}
{match.home_team} vs {match.away_team}
{new Date(match.kickoff_time).toLocaleDateString(undefined, { weekday: 'short', hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })}
SECURE PICK
)) )}
{/* Rules / Protocol Sidebar */}

Arena Protocol

    {[ { title: 'Activation', desc: 'Secure an entry tier to join the challenge.', icon: Shield }, { title: 'Selection', desc: 'Submit one pick each 24-hour cycle.', icon: Target }, { title: 'Verification', desc: 'Results verified by official data feeds.', icon: ShieldCheck }, { title: 'Settlement', desc: 'Achieve 3/3 for 10X reward release.', icon: Award } ].map((rule, i) => (
  • {rule.title}

    {rule.desc}

    • ))}

Full Integrity Pool

Global strategy is synchronized and optimal. Settlement is automated.

); }

'use client'; import { Users, Zap, Link as LinkIcon, Check, ChevronRight, Activity, Globe, ArrowUpRight, Gift, Search, DollarSign } from 'lucide-react'; import Link from 'next/link'; import { useFeedback } from '@/hooks/useFeedback'; interface ReferralClientProps { user: { id: string; email?: string }; profile: { username?: string; full_name?: string }; referrals: Array<{ id: string; created_at: string; status: string; referred_user?: { username?: string; full_name?: string }; }>; totalEarnings: number; } export default function ReferralClient({ profile, referrals, totalEarnings }: ReferralClientProps) { const { success, showSuccess, clear } = useFeedback(); const referralCode = profile?.username?.toUpperCase() || 'REF-USER'; const referralLink = `predchain.io/ref/${referralCode}`; const referralCount = referrals.length; const handleCopy = () => { navigator.clipboard.writeText(referralLink); showSuccess('Referral link copied to clipboard.'); }; return (
{/* Background Ambience */}
{/* Header Section */}
AFFILIATE PROGRAM

Share & Earn.

Invite friends to join the PredChain arena and earn ₦1,000 for every successfully activated account.

Total Earned
₦{totalEarnings.toLocaleString()}
Uncapped Rewards

{/* Referral Link */}
Personal Invite Link Unique Code: {referralCode}
Real-time Attribution Active
Live
{/* Quick Stats */}
{referralCount}
Total Referrals
₦1,000
Per Referral
{/* History Table */}

Referral Log

{referrals.length === 0 ? ( ) : ( referrals.map((r, i) => ( )) )}
Participant Date Payout Status

No referrals found in your network.
{r.referred_user?.username?.[0]?.toUpperCase() || 'U'}
@{r.referred_user?.username || 'Challenger'}
{new Date(r.created_at).toLocaleDateString()} ₦1,000
{r.status === 'qualified' ? 'PAID' : 'PENDING'}
{/* Info Grid */}
{[ { title: 'Commission Policy', desc: 'Unlimited referrals. Earn for every unique account activation.', icon: Gift }, { title: 'Automated Payouts', desc: 'Earnings are credited instantly to your wallet upon verification.', icon: Zap }, { title: 'Global Coverage', desc: 'Invite participants from across the globe to the arena.', icon: Globe } ].map((item, i) => (

{item.title}

{item.desc}

))}
{/* Global Feedback Notifications */} {success && (
{success}
)}
); }
